steps.title: Translate the product
steps.content:
The phrase means multiply $x$ by the number that is $84$ more than $x$. That second factor is $x+84$, so
$$f(x)=x(x+84)$$

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A. $f(x)=x^2+x+84$ has an extra constant and uses $x$, not $84x$.
  • B. $f(x)=x^2+84$ is missing the $84x$ term.
  • C. $f(x)=x^2+84x$ matches the expanded product.
  • D. $f(x)=x^2+84x+84$ has an extra constant.
The answer is C.
